videos.title: Batting Basics - Grip, Stance, and Backlift for Beginners (Hindi)
videos.description: Hindi batting tutorial covering correct grip, balanced stance, backlift position, and basic batting drills for beginners.

videos.title: Front Foot Shots - Cover Drive and Straight Drive Technique
videos.description: Front foot batting technique including cover drive, straight drive, on drive, and weight transfer onto the front foot.

videos.title: Back Foot Shots - Pull, Cut, and Back Foot Punch (Hindi)
videos.description: Hindi tutorial on back foot batting including pull shot, square cut, upper cut, and back foot defense technique.

videos.title: Power Hitting and Six Hitting - T20 Batting Skills
videos.description: How to hit sixes and fours with power hitting technique, bat speed, clearing the boundary, and modern T20 batting shots.

videos.title: Playing Spin Bowling - How to Read and Attack Spinners (Hindi)
videos.description: Hindi guide to playing spin bowling - reading the bowler's hand, footwork to spinners, sweep shot, and using your feet.

videos.title: Playing Fast Bowling - Technique Against Pace and Bounce
videos.description: How to handle fast bowling including watch the ball techniques, playing late, handling short balls, and back foot defense.

videos.title: Fast Bowling Tutorial - Run Up, Action, and Pace Generation
videos.description: Fast bowling fundamentals including smooth run-up, bowling action, release point, and how to generate pace with body action.

videos.title: Swing Bowling - How to Bowl Inswing and Outswing (Hindi)
videos.description: Hindi tutorial on conventional and reverse swing bowling, seam position, wrist angle, and conditions for swing.

videos.title: Seam Bowling and Line-Length Control
videos.description: How to bowl with an upright seam, hit a consistent good length, and use the crease to change angles for seam movement.

videos.title: Death Bowling Yorkers and Slower Balls (Hindi)
videos.description: Hindi guide to death bowling including yorker technique, slower ball variations, wide yorkers, and bowling under pressure in the last overs.

videos.title: Spin Bowling Tutorial - Leg Spin and Off Spin Basics
videos.description: Spin bowling fundamentals covering leg spin grip and release, off spin technique, flight, and setting up batsmen.

videos.title: Fielding Drills - Catching, Diving, and Ground Fielding
videos.description: Fielding practice drills including ground fielding technique, high catches, close catching, and dive-and-recover drills.

videos.title: Wicketkeeping Skills - Stance, Glovework, and Stumping (Hindi)
videos.description: Hindi wicketkeeping tutorial covering stance, footwork, catching technique, standing up to spinners, and stumping technique.

videos.title: Building an Innings - How to Bat Long and Score Runs
videos.description: Hindi tutorial on batting temperament, rotating strike, building partnerships, and converting starts into big scores.

videos.title: T20 Batting Masterclass - Powerplay and Middle Overs
videos.description: Advanced T20 batting tactics covering powerplay aggression, middle overs rotation, and death overs finishing.

videos.title: Cricket Captaincy and Field Placement Tactics
videos.description: Cricket captaincy essentials including field placement for different bowlers, bowling changes, and match situation awareness.

videos.title: Cricket Fitness - Speed, Agility, and Endurance Training (Hindi)
videos.description: Hindi fitness guide for cricketers covering yo-yo test preparation, sprint training, fielding agility, and bowling endurance.

videos.title: Net Practice Drills - How to Make Nets Productive
videos.description: Structured net practice sessions including scenario-based batting, targeted bowling spells, and match simulation drills.

videos.title: Mental Preparation for Cricket - Handling Pressure (Hindi)
videos.description: Hindi guide to mental toughness in cricket, handling match pressure, visualization, dealing with failure, and building confidence.

videos.title: Running Between Wickets - Quick Singles and Communication
videos.description: Hindi guide to running between wickets including calling, backing up, turning technique, and converting ones into twos.
